hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys, json, os; data = json.load(sys.stdin); path = data.get('file_path', ''); blocked = ['Secrets.xcconfig', '.env', 'xcuserstate', 'xcuserdata']; match = next((b for b in blocked if b in path), None); sys.exit(1) if match else sys.exit(0)"

python3 -c "import sys, json; data = json.load(sys.stdin); path = data.get('file_path', ''); needs_test = any(x in path for x in ['Service.swift', 'Calculator.swift', 'Coordinator.swift']) and 'Tests' not in path and '.claude' not in path; print('\n⚠️  Convention: add a matching test file in HoopTrackTests/ for pure logic in this file.') if needs_test else None"
